name: Wacky Cupcakes
recipeIngredient: Liquid sugar substitute, equal to 1/2 cup sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the flour, sugar, cocoa (if used), baking soda, and salt in a mixer bowl and mix on low speed until blended.
2. Beat together the remaining ingredients with a fork until blended.
3. Add all at once to the dry ingredients and beat on medium speed until smooth.
4. Line 12 muffin tins or grease with margarine and flour.
5. Fill muffin tins about 1/2 full.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for about 30 minutes, or until a cake tester comes out clean from the center of the cupcake.
7. Serve 1 cupcake per serving.
8. Food Exchange: 1 BREAD EXCHANGE + 2 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 158; CHO: 17gm; PRO: 2gm; FAT: 10gm.
9. For low-sodium diets, omit salt.
